Network speed test failed with the error message "Unable to calculate".
sub account or sub-account
sub account
英文：符合 TRC20 共识标准
English: Compliant with TRC20 consensus standard
synonym: is equal to
synonym: is equivalent to
英文：允许TVM支持上海升级
English: Allow TVM support for Shanghai upgrade

optimize: stUSDT is a utility token obtained by depositing USDT into RWA Vault Contract and is compliant with the TRC20 standard. It's transfer-supported and can be used in other DeFi protocols. Holding stUSDT equals to holding funds in RWA Vault Contract, including the appreciation part. Generally, the exchange rate between stUSDT and USDT is always 1:1 as ruled in RWA Vault Contract.

optimize: stUSDT is a TRC20 compliant utility token that can be acquired by depositing USDT into the RWA Vault Contract. It supports transfers and can be utilized in various DeFi protocols. Holding stUSDT is equivalent to holding funds in the RWA Vault Contract, including any appreciation. The exchange rate between stUSDT and USDT is generally fixed at 1:1 according to the rules specified in the RWA Vault Contract.

optimizer: By staking USDT in the platform, you can get stUSDT and therefore receive yields by holding stUSDT.
stUSDT will be distributed to the holders regularly according to the Rebase mechanism. The exchange rate between stUSDT and USDT is always 1:1 as ruled in RWA Vault Contract. Therefore, you can get yields as more stUSDT is distributed to your account.

optimizer: By staking USDT on the platform, users can acquire stUSDT and earn yields by holding it. The distribution of stUSDT to holders occurs regularly based on the Rebase mechanism. It is important to note that the exchange rate between stUSDT and USDT is always fixed at 1:1, as specified in the RWA Vault Contract. Consequently, users can earn increasing yields as more stUSDT is distributed to their accounts.

optimize: Staking USDT does not incur any charge. However, when you unstake, {value} of the stUSDT you want to unstake is charged to cover the RWA operating fee. The stUSDT protocol does not impose extra fee on transactions or asset management. The only cost is the gas fee (can be reduced by staking TRX or renting Energy on TRON). However, you should be aware that all investment may involve risks. stUSDT always prioritizes security to minimize risks involved and selects blue-chip RWA as investment targets. For the mechanism, stUSDT is under the governance of RWA DAO to create smart contracts, build asset management mechanism, as well as set strategies on investment and data disclosure.
USDT is issued and managed by Tether. You can visit

optimize: Staking USDT on the platform is free of charge. However, there will be a charge when you choose to unstake a certain amount of stUSDT. This charge is implemented to cover the operating fees of the RWA Vault. The stUSDT protocol does not impose any additional fees on transactions or asset management. The only cost associated is the gas fee, which can be reduced by staking TRX or renting Energy on the TRON network. It is important to understand that all investments carry risks. stUSDT prioritizes security measures to minimize the risks involved and selects reputable RWA assets as investment targets. The governance of stUSDT is managed by the RWA DAO, which oversees the creation of smart contracts, building the asset management mechanism, as well as setting investment strategies and data disclosures. USDT, on the other hand, is issued and managed by Tether. For more information, please visit

optimize: Rebase APY indicates the annualized yield rate of stUSDT holders under the Rebase mechanism. stUSDT holders can sense their yields from their increasing stUSDT balance as the RWA yields will be distributed to the holders in stUSDT according to the Rebase mechanism in RWA Vault Contract. The speed of yield increase depends on RWA appreciation.
Note: There are $10,000,000 emergency reserves in the pool and don't incur yields.

optimize: The Rebase APY represents the annualized yield rate for stUSDT holders participating in the Rebase mechanism. As RWA yields are distributed to stUSDT holders in accordance with the Rebase mechanism specified in the RWA Vault Contract, holders can observe their yields growing alongside their stUSDT balance. The rate at which yields increase is determined by the appreciation of the RWA assets. 

Note: The pool contains $10,000,000 in emergency reserves, which do not generate any yields.

optimize: As regulated in RWA Vault Contract, part of your unstaking amount will be deducted to pay for the operation fee of RWA investment. stUSDT does not impose extra fee on transactions or asset management. The only cost is the gas fee, which can be reduced by staking TRX or

optimize: In accordance with the regulations stated in the RWA Vault Contract, a portion of your unstaking amount will be deducted to cover the operational costs of the RWA investment. stUSDT does not impose any additional fees on transactions or asset management. The only cost incurred is the gas fee, which can be reduced by staking TRX or utilizing other energy-saving methods on the TRON network.
what is cumulative yields

Cumulative yields refer to the total amount of yields or returns accumulated over a specific period of time. It represents the sum of all the yields or returns generated from an investment or asset since the start of the investment or a specified time period. Cumulative yields take into account the compounding effect, where the previously earned yields are reinvested or added to the principal amount, resulting in exponential growth over time.
